description_long: This bungalow is a spacious, single-story residential building set within a rectangular, landscaped lot. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled dark roof with several dormers and a mix of light-colored exterior walls. The front of the property includes a driveway leading to a garage, with manicured lawns and palm trees enhancing the curb appeal. At the rear, there is a large swimming pool, a patio area, and additional green space, all enclosed by a perimeter fence. Multiple windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and views of the outdoor amenities. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, creating a luxurious suburban home.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled dark roof, landscaped yard, driveway, garage, and a backyard pool within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, main entryway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, pool, and the house's side elevation with additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
